notes: v1.2.6 — Iframe-aware selectors. Hotfix for a failure mode discovered after v1.2.5 shipped: PestPac renders form pages and modal dialogs (e.g., the attach-to-lead 'No' confirmation) inside iframes, but Playwright's selector lookups only checked the top frame, so any click/type/select/etc. step targeting an in-iframe element would stall for 30 seconds and fail. v1.2.6 adds automatic iframe traversal — every selector-based step now walks the top frame first, then every iframe, and operates on whichever frame contains the match. No flow changes needed; existing flows just start working. Also keeps the click-step debug checkbox from the v1.2.5-debug1 internal build as a permanent feature: turning it on dumps Playwright's view of the selector (top-frame match count, visibility, bounding box, all iframes scanned) to the runner.log, useful when a click stalls or fails for unclear reasons. No other behavior changes — auto-update, resume, retry-failed, network-aware retry, re-auth, circuit breaker, Excel log enrichment all continue from v1.2.5.
